name: TODO: namespace — e.g. network.clockchain/time or network.clockchain/product (CLO-22, CLO-99)
description: Verified consensus time from the Clockchain network. Returns the latest consented block time and height — a neutral, tamper-evident clock backed by multi-node Marzullo consensus. No logging, no credentials required beyond a transport token.

remotes.url: TODO: product endpoint URL — separate Cloud Run service or same service with MCP_SURFACE=product (CLO-22, CLO-59)
remotes.___network_note: UNRESOLVED: testnet vs mainnet pending CLO-99 and CLO-64. Do not assume mainnet until CLO-64 closes.

headers.name: x-api-key
headers.description: Clockchain transport token. Free token, no signup: curl -X POST https://mcp.clockchain.network/token

___tools_note: This server exposes only the 'get_time' tool (MCP_SURFACE=product). Tool promotion rule: a tool moves to the product surface only when production-ready and explicitly approved via a CLO issue. See PRODUCT-VS-TEST.md.
